items.title: CMA secures fairer deal for publishers and improves Google search services in UK
items.abstract: Conduct requirement introduced today gives publishers more control and stronger bargaining power over the use of their content.

_analysis.summary: Conduct requirement introduced today gives publishers more control and stronger bargaining power over the use of their content.

synthesis.headline: Digital Competition Digest — 2026-W23
synthesis.executive_summary: AI synthesis unavailable: your GOOGLE_API_KEY project has the free-tier quota set to 0 (billing-enabled projects disable the free tier). To fix this, go to https://aistudio.google.com/apikey, create a new key in a project without billing, and update the GOOGLE_API_KEY secret. This digest contains 1 items collected without AI analysis.
